message:
ci: build all 11 benchmarks in setup action

Add missing benchmarks to setup-edgebox action:
- mandelbrot
- prime_factors
- gaussian_blur
- average
- path_trace

Previously only built 6 benchmarks (hello, memory, fib, loop,
tail_recursive, typed_array).

files.patch:
@@ -143,7 +143,7 @@ runs:
       shell: bash
       run: |
         echo "Building all benchmarks..."
-        for bench in hello memory fib loop tail_recursive typed_array; do
+        for bench in hello memory fib loop tail_recursive typed_array mandelbrot prime_factors gaussian_blur average path_trace; do
           echo "Building $bench..."
           ./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build bench/$bench.js
         done
